heading: Payment of certain expenses
label: 6563 Payment of certain expenses
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 68f of this titleSection is from the Legislative Branch Appropriations Act, 2012, which is div. G of the Consolidated Appropriations Act, 2012.

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Subject to the approval of the Committee on Appropriations of the Senate, if in any fiscal year amounts in any appropriations account under the heading “SENATE” under the heading “LEGISLATIVE BRANCH” are available for more than 1 fiscal year, the Secretary of the Senate may establish procedures for the payment of expenses with respect to that account from any amounts available for that fiscal year.

children.heading: Effective date
children.label: b Effective date
children.text: This section shall apply to fiscal year 2012 and each fiscal year thereafter.
